title: Education Edition Reforged
description: Adds the 118 Elements from Minecraft Education Edition, and more
body:
# Welcome to MC:EE Reforged
**The mod ports all 118 element blocks from Education Edition, with additional compounds/items/blocks to be added** --- ![118 Elements](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/AgZRfe77/images/04b23700000b99fc411ea72d647b7aee7e04b1f0.png 'All 118 Elements') # How to use Material Reducer ![How to use Material Reducer](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/AgZRfe77/images/5fcf0ab41cedfba039b6e06e396fb3ebd86759df.png 'Right click the block using the item you want to deconstruct') How to use Material Reducer: Right click the block using the item you want to deconstruct
Nerfed original MC:EE reducer recipes
(Reference: [https://minecraft.fandom.com/wiki/Material_Reducer](https://minecraft.fandom.com/wiki/Material_Reducer)) + Andesite/Granite/Diorite/Quartz/Sand/Stone -> Si, O x2 (Ref: Silicon Dioxide) + Grass/Mycelium -> C, O, N, P + Dirt -> Si, Ca, P, N, Fe, Mg, Zn, Cu, O + Overworld Wood -> C, H, O, N + Cobble/Lava/Magma -> O, Si, Al, Fe, Ca, Na, K, Mg + Mossy Cobble -> O, Si, Al, Fe, Ca, Na, K, Mg, C + Water/Ice/Snow -> H x2, O + Iron Ore -> Fe, Si, O x2 + Gold Ore -> Au, Si, O x2 + Diamond Ore -> C, Si, O x2 + Copper Ore -> Cu, Si, O x2 + Lapis Lazuli/Ore -> Na, S, Al, O, Si + Redstone/Ore -> U x3, C x5, Unknown x4 (Ref: Uranium Carbide) + Coal/Ore -> C, H, O, N, S + Emerald/Ore -> Be x3, Al x2, Si x6, O x18 (Ref: Beryl) + Iron Nugg/Ing/Blk -> Fe + Gold Nugg/Ing/Blk -> Au + Diamond/Blk -> C + Netherrack -> Si, O x3, Hg, Unknown x2 (Ref: Silicon Dioxide, Mercury Oxide) + End Stone -> Si, C, Unknown x4 (Ref: Silicon Carbide) + Glowstone/Blk -> Ar x2, B x2, Kr x2, Ne x2 + Soul Sand -> Si, O x3, Unknown x4 (Ref: Silicate) + Clay/Terracotta/Glazed -> Si, Al, Fe, Mg, Ca, O + Glow Ink -> Fe, Si, O x4 (Ref: Iron Sulfate) + Sugar -> C x6, H x12, O x6 (Ref: Glucose) + Charcoal -> C x7, H x4, O

+ Added support for MCTerra in Material Reducer, if installed + Copper Bar -> Cu + Tin Bar -> Sn + Lead Bar -> Pb + Iron Bar -> Fe + Silver Bar -> Ag + Tungsten Bar -> W + Gold Bar -> Au + Platinum Bar -> Pt
# How to use Element Constructor ![How to use Element Constructor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3b5b0bcbf789cea48eb149049acc4244996ff1de.png 'Type 0-118 to get desired element') + Unknown Element will drop a random element when broken without Silk Touch In-game guide available: Compound Creator
Miniscule updates
